summary: Stunning audience recording captures the high‑energy Brockport show with crystal‑clear sound and a standout “Eyes of the World” performance.
review: Both reviewers rave about this night, noting that the recording perfectly conveys the arena’s buzz and crowd excitement. The audio is described as crisp and full‑bodied, while the music shines especially on the classic “Eyes of the World” jam and Phil Lesh’s standout playing. Overall it’s a high‑energy show preserved in excellent listening condition.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews give 5 stars and praise the performance and sound, indicating an exceptional show with a high‑quality audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the tape as sounding great, full of pizazz and verve, capturing crowd energy without mentioning any dropouts or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic first half with classic jams; reviewers highlight overall high energy and seamless flow.

band_member_comments.Phil: Phil was highlighted as outstanding by multiple reviewers.
